items.title: As JPMorgan’s Dimon warns of cockroaches in credit, MRB says kitchen still clean
items.description: Investing.com--JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon’s recent warned cockroaches skittering through credit markets following bankruptcies of auto companies Tricolor Holdings and First Brands, stoking fears of a credit cycle turn, but analysts at MRB Partners say the kitchen’s still clean pointing to data showing sturdy credit metrics that will likely get helping hand from Fed rate cuts and a healthy economy.

items.title: JPMorgan Chase (JPM): Exploring Valuation After New $500B Sustainable Investment and Strong Growth Results
items.description: JPMorgan Chase (JPM) has been drawing fresh attention after sharing its latest financials, showing growth in both net income and overall revenue. Alongside these results, the bank's announcement to allocate $500 billion towards sustainable industries and up to $10 billion in U.S. companies is starting conversations about its future direction. See our latest analysis for JPMorgan Chase. JPMorgan Chase’s latest moves, from ramping up sustainable industry investment to making leadership changes,...

items.title: Bank of America Delivers Its Pitch to Investors—and Wall Street Shrugs
items.description: At the bank’s first investor day since 2011, it sought to show it can be as profitable as peers such as JPMorgan Chase.

items.title: The Next Big Quantum Computer Has Arrived
items.description: Quantinuum unveiled its latest system, Helios, inching the industry toward the day the technology will deliver meaningful commercial value.

items.title: Hyatt and Chase Expand their Collaboration as World of Hyatt Loyalty Program Continues Industry-Leading Growth
items.description: CHICAGO, November 05, 2025--Hyatt and Chase Expand their Collaboration as World of Hyatt Loyalty Program Continues Industry-Leading Growth
